name: Cheng Ni
title: Founder & CEO
bio:
I am the Founder & CEO of MindSparks AI.

I am a combined Master-Ph.D. student at the School of Excellent Engineers, Southeast University, advised by Dr. Wang Xi at the EDA National Innovation Center. My research is in AI for Chip — focusing on LLM-accelerated verification, IP auto-generation, and LLM-enabled agile hardware development. Before that, I received my B.S. in Electronic Science and Technology from Wuhan University of Science and Technology, graduating first in my major.
goal: Building next-generation intelligent products with AI Agent technology
